subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Although I have summoned you from India with utmost urgency via telegraph on account of a grave matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان هر چند بجهت امر مهمی شما را سریعا تلغرافیا از هندوستان خواستم
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
